# 41 Labs — AI Integration for Businesses in Singapore

> 41 Labs builds custom AI systems for businesses doing $1M+ revenue. We find the one process bleeding your business the most time and money, and build an AI system that fixes it. Free strategy call. Free working demo. $0 until you see clear value.

## About
41 Labs is a Singapore-based AI systems company founded by Alexander Lee. We build custom AI trained on our clients' internal data — their products, processes, and pricing rules — for accuracy you can trust in production. We specialize in construction, healthcare, home services, professional services, automotive, F&B, and beauty & wellness industries.

## Services
- AI Strategy & Consulting: Free 30-minute strategy call to map workflows and find highest-ROI AI opportunities
- Custom AI System Development: Quoting engines, dispatch systems, document processing, customer service bots, internal knowledge bases
- Free Working Demo: We build a prototype using your actual business data before any commitment
- End-to-End Delivery: Strategy to deployed production system in 4-8 weeks
- Ongoing Support: Maintenance, iteration, and team training after deployment

## Industries
- Construction & Renovation — AI quoting systems that cut quote generation from 3 hours to 5 minutes
- Healthcare & Clinics — 24/7 patient Q&A bots, automated appointment reminders, intake processing
- Home Services — AI scheduling, dispatch, and invoicing for plumbing, aircon, electrical, cleaning
- Professional Services — Document analysis, client onboarding, internal knowledge bases for accounting, legal, consulting
- Automotive & Tow Truck — AI dispatch, driver coordination, automated invoicing, 24/7 call handling
- F&B & Restaurants — Demand forecasting, reservation management, menu Q&A bots
- Beauty & Wellness — 24/7 booking assistant, no-show reminders, client preference tracking

## Real Client Results
- Avenue Engineering: AI-powered quoting system — reduced quote generation from hours to minutes
- 365 Tow: AI dispatch and invoicing system for roadside assistance operations

## How It Works
1. Free 30-minute AI strategy call with the founder — we map your workflows and identify highest-ROI opportunities
2. Free working demo built with your actual business data — see the results before committing
3. Production system deployed in 4-8 weeks — you see progress weekly
4. Ongoing support — maintenance, iteration, and team training until it runs smoothly
